news.title: 3% inflation might not be the 'win' the current Fed thought it would be
news.summary: Wednesday marks the Federal Reserve's first FOMC meeting with new chairman Kevin Warsh at the helm. Interactive Brokers senior economist José Torres and Aristotle Pacific portfolio manager Jeff Klingelhofer examine whether a 3% inflation rate is really "on the way" from new Fed leadership and how officials could vote on interest rates. The FOMC meeting will conclude tomorrow, June 17, with a decision on rates and a press conference with Chairman Warsh.
